description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated within a walled yard, featuring a spacious green lawn and a variety of landscaping elements. The house has a light-colored exterior with large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The property includes a backyard with a small round pool, a patio area, and several trees and shrubs, some with pink foliage and one large tree with green leaves. The roof is primarily a hip style with multiple intersecting sections, and the main entryway is defined by a simple, flat overhang and a set of steps leading to the front door. The surrounding fence provides privacy, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, patio, and various trees. The property is enclosed by a fence and has a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a spacious lawn with a few trees and a small round pool near the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard patio area, a row of tall shrubs, and the large tree at the rear corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, round pool, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the fence line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, patio, and the large tree and round pool near the side fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, steps, and a minimalistic door design
